title: Is Dry Bulk Shipping the trade of the year?
section_path: Is Dry Bulk Shipping the trade of the year?
section_path_text: Is Dry Bulk Shipping the trade of the year?
summary:
Main
June was an epic month for dry bulk freight rates, especially for the Capesize segment. Smaller size vessels, like Panamax and Supramax, also caught up with increased spot rates. Capes currently are experiencing an anticipated correction and this cannot be considered as anything but healthy.
